title: Simple Advancements
description: Not game changing - just get a few additional, fun achievements in your game!
body:
# 🏆 Simple Achievements+ – [Datapack for Minecraft 1.21.4]
### 
**Simple Achievements+ is a lightweight advancement pack designed to spice up your survival playthrough with fun, cheeky goals that reward the way you already play.**

### 
**Get Various Different [More Upcoming] Achievments that won't make YOUR survival game feel like you are cheating!**

**Find out what advancements there are below -- Spoiler?**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This Datapack currently has:

**PoisonPotato** – Eat A Poisonous Potato.\
**GetHit** – Get Hit!\
**GoldenDrip** – Ooooo... Golden Armor\
**IronArmor** – Basic? Maybe. Essential? Definitely. -> Iron Armor\
**EatAChorusFruit** – Teleport into the unknown by eating a **Chorus Fruit**\
**PlaceTheDragonEgg** – Because why not?\
**StackOfNetherite** – The grind is real. -> get **64 BLOCKS** of Netherite\
**Spiderrr** - Eat a Spider Eye\
**Take Down The Beast** - Defeat the Warden!\
**Nature’s Betrayal** - Kill an Axoltl... Why?\
**Sleep Deprived** - Don't sleep and gte hit by a phantom...\
**Luberjack Start** - Break your first block\

UPCOMING:
N/A

FIXING:

**Peacful?** - Are you sure they [llamas] are peacful?\
**It Begins** - Place down your first block\
**Deep Dark** - Somehow Get Below Y = -64
</details>


# ⚙️ Installation:
Drop the file in your world’s /datapacks folder
You may find this by doing 
```
%appdata%
.minecraft -> saves -> look for your world -> put the file under datapacks
```
As Easy As This!


Run /reload in game to get the datapack (if the game was open)

You're good to go. The advancements will unlock as you play!




# 🧪 Built For:


🛠️ Vanilla SMP Servers

🎮 Chill Survival Sessions With No Game Changing Mods

🧊 Casual Players Who Still Want a Challenge

🧊🎮🛠️     For People Who Want to Have Fun!     🛠️🎮🧊


# Version Support
This has only been tested on version 1.21.4 and 1.21.5 -> It may work on previous versions but I havent tested them out yet!


# Issues or Concerns?
I am new so feedback and idead is will be appreciated!

Reddit Page: [Simple Achivements](https://www.reddit.com/r/SimpleAchivements/)
